- Source / official reference:

## Impact assessment

- Affected components (files / routes / registries):
- Affected registers (COMPLIANCE_GAPS.md, model registry, risk-appetite, obligations):

## Required action

<!-- What "compliant" looks like, and the acceptance evidence. -->

## Owner & timeline

- Owner:
- Target compliance date:
- Severity: [ ] Critical [ ] High [ ] Medium [ ] Low

> Record the decision as an ADR ([`docs/adr/`](../../docs/adr/)) and, where
> material, a committee minute. Update the regulatory obligations register.
>
> ⚠️ Do **not** include real customer PII, sanctions hits, or secrets in this issue.
